title: Database symlink support -- install to E:\dev\databases via directory junctions

added: Directory junction creation from E:\dev\databases\<name> to actual Chocolatey install paths
Symlink log messages in shared/log-messages.json (7 new messages)
All 12 database run.ps1 files now dot-source symlink-utils.ps1 and call New-DbSymlink after install
changed: installMode 'devDir' config option now actually creates junctions to the dev directory
Version bumped to 0.5.0 (minor bump for new feature)
fixed: Databases previously installed to system default locations ignoring devDir config -- now symlinked to E:\dev\databases\<name>
